description: Cancer care vocabulary. Covers chemotherapy session-level data collection and standardised tumour response assessment per RECIST criteria. These are the CIEL ConvSets with the broadest cascade coverage for oncology workflows; oncology diagnoses (ICD-10 C-codes) and individual drug ingredients are already carried via CIEL SAME-AS mappings and will appear in concept_reference_maps.

notes.167876: Chemotherapy detail (ConvSet) — session-level chemotherapy data construct covering drug administration, cycle number, dose, cumulative dose, toxicity grading, and treatment intent (~20 concepts)
notes.168161: RECIST tumor response set (ConvSet) — Response Evaluation Criteria in Solid Tumours coded answer set: Complete Response, Partial Response, Stable Disease, Progressive Disease, and Not Evaluable (~5 concepts)
